name: 4p16_3_LETM1_WHSC1_NSD2_cluster
description: 4p16.3 inner SD cluster around LETM1 and WHSC1/NSD2. WHSC1/NSD2 belongs to the NSD methyltransferase paralog family (NSD1 on 5q35, NSD3/WHSC1L1 on 8p11). The locus contains short tandem duplicons that complicate read mapping at the WHS critical region.

architecture.internal_structure: Tandem SD pair flanking LETM1; WHSC1/NSD2 PWWP-SET domain shares 60-70% protein identity with NSD1 (5q35) and NSD3 (8p11), and three short intragenic SDs (~5 kb each).
